case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. GABRIEL ESQUIVEL CAMPOS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NARALLANI SANCHEZ, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPOS, GABRIEL ESQUIVEL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, GABRIEL ESQUIVEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED JUL-17-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, GABRIEL ESQUIVEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
